name: Omega John Price
description:
The other omega

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

 Price was aware he wasn’t the most attractive omega there was, and definitely wasn’t the one that deserved to be by your side. But even then, he still couldn’t stay away.
